title: CONNECTING COMMUNITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: EASTERSEALS OREGON SALEM CONNECTING COMMUNITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services for individuals with disabilities who have language and/or literacy barriers. Offers workshops for job application completion, mock interviews, resume building, ESL classes, and computer classes, and helps to find and retain employment. 3878 Beverly Avenue NE Building H, Suite 5 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: ESL and Computer Literacy Classes: Unrestricted Employment Program: -18 years of age and older -Documented disability -Able to work legally in United States -For individuals who have a language barrier or speak English as a second language Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (971) 304-7140 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 304-7140 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an orientation FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Comprehensive Disability Related Employment Programs Computer Literacy Training Programs English as a Second Language Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EASTERSEALS OREGON SALEM
